name: Finnish
modelReview: blind 3-persona Sonnet panel + round-trip over the spanning set (34 patterns, 2026-06-24, after the compound-rendering fix): round-trip clean (30/31; the one miss is recover-agent noise on a correct description — meaning preserved). The targeted compound "tai"-rakenne defects are fixed — OR-scope now fronts the month+time and brackets the union with joko…tai (panel-confirmed correct, improved from 2 to 3), and the double-month / genitive month-list / mixed-cadence / level-separation clusters are resolved. Naturalness improved (median 4, 26/34 items at median ≥ 4 vs the prior compound-heavy 17's worse ratio) but still misses the beta bar: 8/34 below median 4, now blocked by DIFFERENT, out-of-scope conventions — clock-with-seconds notation (klo 9.30.15, median 2), Quartz-W phrasing, the seconds/minute `kohdalla` register, and the inherent literariness of cron OR-semantics even in the corrected joko…tai form.
note: EXPERIMENTAL — compound OR/cadence rendering fixed and round-trip-clean (see src/lang/fi/notes.md “Compound schedules”). The re-review cleared the original “tai”-rakenne defect but surfaced new dominant naturalness blockers outside the compound-fix scope: the clock-with-seconds notation (klo 9.30.15), Quartz-W phrasing, and the seconds-`kohdalla` register. Next steps toward beta: address the clock-with-seconds notation and seconds register, plus the ja-vs-`sekä klo` pure-hour-list consistency (id 18) and isolated-then-range `sekä` (id 16). Re-review after those.
